_meta.note: Alle Bilder durch Pipeline: python3 scripts/process-master-image.py <input> img/farben/<name>.png

A_fenster_2fl_innen.label: Fenster 2-Flügel INNEN
A_fenster_2fl_innen.prompt_template:
Perfectly flat 2D frontal orthographic view — zero perspective, zero angle, camera dead center.
Two-leaf PVC casement window INTERIOR inside view.
Two equal sashes side by side with slim center mullion.
Left sash hinged on far left, opens left. Right sash hinged on far right, opens right.
Hinges: two slim metallic silver hinge bands per sash — top and bottom outer edge only, NO middle hinge.
TWO slim metallic silver lever handles meeting at center: lever handle on RIGHT side of left sash pointing DOWNWARD vertically, lever handle on LEFT side of right sash pointing DOWNWARD vertically.
SLIM THIN FRAME: maximum 10% of total width per side.
Large glass panes fill each sash.
Frame and sashes: {COLOR_DESC}.
Handles and hinges: metallic silver finish, independent of frame color.
Dark black rubber gasket seal around glass.
White #FFFFFF background.
NO text, NO labels, NO watermarks, NO captions, NO product names written on image.
Drutex manufacturer catalog photo.

B_fenster_2fl_aussen.label: Fenster 2-Flügel AUSSEN
B_fenster_2fl_aussen.prompt_template:
Perfectly flat 2D frontal orthographic view — zero perspective, zero angle, camera dead center.
Two-leaf PVC casement window EXTERIOR outside view.
Two equal panels side by side with slim PVC frame.
SLIM THIN FRAME: frame profile maximum 10% of total window width on each side.
Large glass panes fill center area.
Simple clean flat frame profile — no decorative molding, no carved details.
Frame and sash: {COLOR_DESC}.
No handle. No hinges. No hardware of any kind visible from outside.
Glass: pure white opaque, no reflection.
Dark black rubber gasket seal around glass.
White #FFFFFF background.
NO text, NO labels, NO watermarks, NO captions, NO product names written on image.
Drutex manufacturer catalog photo.

C_balkontuer_innen.label: Balkontür INNEN
C_balkontuer_innen.prompt_template:
Perfectly flat 2D frontal orthographic view — zero perspective, zero angle, camera dead center.
Single-leaf PVC balcony patio door INTERIOR inside view.
Full-height narrow door panel, floor to top, portrait orientation.
SLIM THIN FRAME: frame profile maximum 8% of total width on each side.
Very large glass pane fills 85% of door area, from near bottom to near top.
Simple clean flat frame profile — no decorative molding.
Frame and sash: {COLOR_DESC}.
Handle lever pointing DOWNWARD vertically, positioned at center-right of door.
White #FFFFFF background.
NO text, NO labels, NO watermarks, NO captions, NO product names written on image.
Drutex manufacturer catalog photo.

E_hst_innen.label: Hebe-Schiebetür (HST) INNEN
E_hst_innen.prompt_template:
Perfectly flat 2D frontal orthographic view — zero perspective, zero angle, camera dead center.
Two-panel PVC lift-and-slide door (Hebe-Schiebetür) INTERIOR inside view.
Wide landscape-format sliding door with two very large glass panels side by side.
Extremely slim PVC frame — slim top rail, slim vertical center post, slim side frames.
Glass panels dominate 85% of total image area.
Simple flat clean frame — no decorative molding.
Frame and sash: {COLOR_DESC}.
Slim horizontal handle bar on right panel, handle lever pointing DOWNWARD vertically.
White #FFFFFF background.
NO text, NO labels, NO watermarks, NO captions, NO product names written on image.
Drutex manufacturer catalog photo.
